user.title: Connect to Warmup
user.description: Enter your Warmup account credentials from my.warmup.com.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Warmup
reauth_confirm.description: Your Warmup session expired. Please enter your credentials again.

abort.already_configured: This Warmup account is already configured.
